headline: Salesforce Connectors From Redpanda Put Focus On CRM Valuation Gap
summary: Redpanda has launched Salesforce connectors that enable real-time, bidirectional data integration between Salesforce and enterprise data systems. The rollout includes native processors and connectors designed to bypass traditional middleware and support continuous data streaming into and out of Salesforce. This update positions Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) more directly as a data hub connecting CRM records with wider operational systems across an organization. For you as an investor looking at...
